Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey... Sorry about last time, when, you know...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Anyway, would you mind listenin' to this old man complain?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I'm sober today, so... sit tight, will ya?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}All I had to do was look all serious and recite the sutras... I could make easy money from donations...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}That's what I thought. That's why I set aside my pride and begged my parents to let me take over the temple.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}But every day is someone's death anniversary! Kinda makes you think how long people've been around![n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 2 25 25}I'm workin' memorial service after memorial service 24/7, as if my little temple was some kinda convenience store...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}If only I could... But I have a strong sense of duty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I can't say no to someone who needs my service. It's the burden of a strong moral compass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}...That's only half true, kid. Sure, I've got no time for leisure, but I'm definitely not poor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}It varies, of course, but an offering can sometimes be as much as a white-collar worker's year-end bonus.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 0 25 25}I gotta push this old body of mine to the limit. I hate this "work your ass off" mentality.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Maybe I should think of somethin' else to do with my life. I can't keep this up for much longer... My alcohol tolerance is weaker too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}I've been drinkin' too much lately... Makin' a fool of myself like I did the other day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}...Thanks. I know you're just tryin' to make me feel better, but... I'll take it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}Yeah, maybe you're right. Ya gotta know when to quit when you're ahead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}We never filed for divorce, and I've got some pretty good real estate now that I've inherited this temple.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}It's not a bad deal. I've got enough money that I can retire and just enjoy the rest of my life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 13 17 5 114}Come on, don't gimme that. I really put a lotta thought into this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I'm thinking about asking them to come back... You know, my wife... and my son.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}First, I gotta find out where they are. I'll hire a detective. I don't care how much it costs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}And when I see 'em, first thing I'm gonna do is tell 'em I'm sorry... from the bottom of my heart.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 3 25 25}I'm gonna be concentratin' on them, so... I probably won't be seein' ya anytime soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}W-Well, I'm glad this is it. One brat is all I can handle at a time, and I've gotta deal with my own son now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Despite his harsh words, Mutatsu[n]sounds like he's going to miss me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]Mutatsu a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}If I knew it was gonna end up like this, I never woulda become a monk...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I guess I'll go to a detective agency tomorrow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I left the club with Mutatsu.[n]{f 1 1}
